title: CNMD - ServiceInteraction schema
description: Schema for an interaction in which a service is provided to a customer.

addressLocality.description: The locality, which must correspond to the municipality

addressRegion.description: The NUTS 2 region in which the locality is located

district.description: The administrative district in which the locality is located

type.description: Property. NGSI entity type. It must be ServiceInteraction.

bookingDate.description: Property. Date and time when the service interaction was booked, in ISO 8601 format.

bookingChannel.description: Property. Channel through which the service interaction was booked.

bookingStatus.description: Property. Current status of the booking.

competencyProfile.description: Property. Competency profile of the person who provided the service.

dateStarted.description: Property. Date and time when the service interaction started, in ISO 8601 format.

dateFinished.description: Property. Date and time when the service interaction finished, in ISO 8601 format.

dateCreated.description: Property. Date and time when the entity was created, in ISO 8601 format.

dateModified.description: Property. Date and time when the entity was last modified, in ISO 8601 format.

description.description: Property. Textual description of the service interaction.

intakeChannel.description: Property. Channel through which the service request was received.

providingEntity.description: Property. Name or URI of the entity that provides the service.

serviceStatus.description: Property. Current status of the service interaction.

serviceName.description: Property. Name of the service in which the interaction took place.

rating.description: Property. Rating assigned to the service interaction.

refCustomerServiceUnit.description: Relationship. Identifier of the point of interest where the service is provided.

refRelatedInteractions.description: Relationship. References to other interactions related to the same matter.

ticketDate.description: Property. Date and time when the service queue ticket was issued, in ISO 8601 format.

ticketType.description: Property. Type of service queue ticket.

ticketStatus.description: Property. Current status of the service queue ticket.

typeOfService.description: Property. Objective or kind of service to be provided during the interaction.
